case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. STEVEN HURLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HURLEY, STEVEN

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-13-2020 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON OCT-19-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT STEVEN HURLEY APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO SECURE A WITNESS AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60.00 TO BE PAID IN ROOM 103 AND URGES PARTIES TO SETTLE THE CASE. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
COURT TRIAL ON OCT-19-2020 HELD. JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART, CLERK C. BANAYAD, NOT REPORTED (504)
